specialties.title: Post-Quantum & System Auditing
specialties.desc: Formally proving algorithmic correctness of quantum key exchanges, auditing firmware trust chains, and assessing ITAR cryptographic boundaries.

specialties.title: Sub-Nanometer Control Firmware
specialties.desc: Developing specialized device drivers, lithography print loops, and real-time controller interrupts on metal for direct hardware processors.

specialties.title: LEO Satcom & Optical Routing
specialties.desc: Designing custom networking protocols on satellites to handle near-zero latency, multi-gigabit laser link handoffs and packet alignment.

specialties.title: GPS-Denied Autonomy & SLAM
specialties.desc: Retrofitting multi-ton machinery with real-time lidar telemetry, spatial awareness routines, and advanced hydraulic feedback logic.

liveGigs.title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Audit Consultant
liveGigs.description: Audit critical cryptographic blocks for safe SCADA pipelines inside our Series A portfolio company based in Munich. Requires ITAR/Sovereign clearance capability.

liveGigs.title: Sub-Nanometer Lithography Control Architect
liveGigs.description: Consult directly on our Swiss partner’s laser interference system. Optimize microchip lithography print loops down to 0.7nm accuracy. Cleanroom certified is highly ideal.

liveGigs.title: Autonomous Mining SLAM Software Designer
liveGigs.description: Configure and deploy specialized GPS-denied 3D SLAM controllers inside heavy excavation drill rigs. Experience working in extreme subterranean settings is critical.

liveGigs.title: LEO Laser Constellation Transceiver Architect
liveGigs.description: Drive high-tempo satcom development. Standardize low level optical link handoffs between orbital laser hubs. Mil-spec hardware integration experience required.
